chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 995 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.182/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.7342/2025 (R/Surety) 13.01.2026 Mr. Abdul Sattar Thaheem, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Kamaluddin alias Kamal, Ali Anwar alias Ali and Abdul Ghaffar were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 13.10.2025, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.2,00,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing six original defence savings certificates amounting to Rs.1,00,000/- each. Thereafter, bail application of accused was dismissed being infructuous vide order dated 04.12.2025 as it was claimed that the accused were arrested in another crime. On the earlier dates of hearings, applicant was required to submit proof of bail acquired by the accused subsequent to the dismissal order of this Court dated 04.12.2025. Today, learned Counsel referring to his earlier statement dated 29.12.2025, whereby he has furnished photocopy of order dated 18.12.2025 passed in Cr. Bail Application No. S-1223 of 2025, submits another statement annexing certified copy of the diary of the trial Court dated 03.01.2026, and states that the accused after obtaining second bail from this Court have joined the trial.

Bail Application No. S-1223 of 2025, submits another statement annexing certified copy of the diary of the trial Court dated 03.01.2026, and states that the accused after obtaining second bail from this Court have joined the trial. Learned Assistant P.G., in view of the above position, extends his no objection for granting this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
